name: Calypso Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 Boneless pork loin chops - about 4 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a ziplock bag; seal the bag and refrigerate for 4-24 hours.
2. Remove chops from marinade, discarding leftover marinade.
3. Grill chops quickly over indirect heat in covered grill about 10-12 minutes, turning once to brown both sides.
